name: Wattfox
desc: If this card is destroyed by your opponent's card (either by battle or by card effect), your opponent cannot Special Summon a monster, or activate Spells, Traps, Spell/Trap effects, or Monster Card effects, for the rest of this turn.
flavor: If this card is destroyed by your opponent's card (either by battle or by card effect), your opponent cannot Special Summon a monster, or activate Spells, Traps, Spell/Trap effects, or Monster Card effects, for the rest of this turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
